sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 57:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 57:1
items.html: Two breachings: The first whereby the coupling of AB and SAG, a new light descended and breached the Parsa, meaning lowered the bottom Hey from there and the boundary was canceled. The second is that it breached the walls of the vessels of AK through the Peh of Yesod, and that new light came to the ten Sefirot of Nekudim, as well. (Inner Light, Item 16)
